sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101928" key="sxoinome/trhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σχοινο-μέτρησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n101928.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">land-survey</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῆς Συρίας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0697.tlg001:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Polyh.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
